case_title: MICHELLE LEIGH MCDERMOTT VS. EXPRESS STORES, INC., WHICH WILL DO BUSINESS IN CA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCDERMOTT, MICHELLE LEIGH AS TO DEFENDANT EXPRESS STORES, INC., WHICH WILL DO BUSINESS IN CA LIFORNIA AS LIMITED EXPRESS STORES, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCDERMOTT, MICHELLE LEIGH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EXPRESS STORES, INC., WHICH WILL DO BUSINESS IN CA LIFORNIA AS LIMITED EXPRESS STORES, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION $1,775.38 PRINCIPAL, $.35 INTEREST, $115.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,891.03, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
